issues.details: footer.links.json is empty ([]). The <footer> AEM element on juvederm.nl is an empty AEM container with no rendered links. This is accurate to the source site's design — the AEM footer element contains only an empty cmp-container div. Legal/utility links (disclaimer, contact-us, algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker, abbvie privacy) appear only in page body content. The crawler correctly captured this reality and documented it in README.md, manifest.json navigation.footerNote, and manifest.json navigation.legalLinks. The pseudo-footer accordion structure is fully captured in sample-scrape.json chrome.footer.pseudoFooterStructure. footer-desktop.png (96KB) exists and is non-blank.
issues.remediation: No remediation needed for the capture — the site genuinely has no footer links. Blueprint phase must model legal/utility links from page body content, not the AEM footer element. The pseudo-footer accordion is documented in sample-scrape.json chrome.footer.pseudoFooterStructure and should be the basis for EDS footer navigation.

issues.criterion: aemComponentMapping top-level object should be populated
issues.details: sample-scrape.json contains an empty aemComponentMapping: {} at the top level. However, per-page AEM component counts are correctly captured in samplePages[slug].aemComponents for all 7 sample pages, yielding 19 unique component types (accordion, button, card, carousel, comparison-slider, container, embed, header, image, location-services, modal, navigation, navigation-list, scrollreveal, tabs, teaser, text, title, video-plyr). The orchestrator-claimed 19 types are verifiably present at the page level.
issues.remediation: The blueprint phase can derive the component mapping from samplePages[slug].aemComponents. No re-scrape required.

evidence.finding: 14 pages captured. Minimum threshold is 10. PASS.
evidence.detail: 14 pages across 6 archetypes: homepage (2), treatment-page (5), faq (1), clinic-finder (3), contact (1), legal (2).

evidence.finding: Sitemap has 13 URLs; manifest has 14. Extra URL is apex domain (https://www.juvederm.nl → redirects to /nl), discoverable by link traversal but not in sitemap. No truncation. PASS.
evidence.render_strategy: Direct HTTP fetch of sitemap.xml via urllib with SSL bypass; regex extraction of <loc> elements
Playwright Chromium headless, viewport 1440x900, ignoreHTTPSErrors=true, waitUntil=domcontentloaded + networkidle(12s timeout) + dismiss #onetrust-accept-btn-handler + 3s stability wait

viewports.name: desktop
viewports.method: manual visual inspection + text-length comparison (bundle=8036 chars extracted, fresh-render=6274 body chars; bundle has MORE text — no pre-hydration issue with bundle)

evidence.finding: Page renders with real Dutch content. Bundle text length (8036 chars) exceeds fresh render (6274) — bundle was not captured pre-hydration. Difference explained by bundle capturing hidden/inactive tab content in full DOM. PASS.

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright Chromium headless, viewport 1440x900, ignoreHTTPSErrors=true, waitUntil=domcontentloaded + networkidle + dismiss #onetrust-accept-btn-handler + content stability loop (500ms x 4)

evidence.finding: FAQ page renders with full content. Text lengths match closely (fresh 20604 vs bundle 24165 chars). PASS.

14 pages in source-bundle/pages/, each with desktop.png, mobile.png, index.html, meta.json. Chrome has header.html (43KB, real nav content), footer.html (299B, genuinely empty AEM container), header.links.json (27 links), footer.links.json (empty — accurate to site), header-desktop.png (53KB), footer-desktop.png (96KB). PASS with medium issue on footer links.

README documents: Playwright Chromium headless, viewports 1440x900 (desktop) and 390x844 (mobile), settle strategy (domcontentloaded + networkidle 12s timeout + content-stability loop 500ms x4 + OneTrust #onetrust-accept-btn-handler + 800ms settle), site quirks (SSL bypass, OneTrust, AEM backend, empty footer, Google Maps API). PASS.

7 sample pages present: clinic-finder/nl-find-a-clinic, contact/nl-contact-us, faq/nl-qa, homepage/nl, legal/nl-disclaimer, treatment-page/nl-treatment-lips, treatment-page/nl-treatment-restore. Each has cleaned.html (231-350KB), metadata.json, screenshot.png (149KB-5.4MB). All non-trivial sizes indicating real captured content. PASS.

12 patterns: heroSection, treatmentCardsCarousel, comparisonSlider, benefitsSection, treatmentTabs, clinicFinder, faqAccordion, footerAccordion, pharmaNotice, videoEmbed, scrollReveal, referenceSection. Coverage is reasonable for juvederm.nl. Patterns include interactive (tabs, carousel, comparison-slider, accordion), functional (clinicFinder, videoEmbed), pharma-specific (pharmaNotice, referenceSection), and utility (scrollReveal, heroSection). No obvious missing patterns from source-bundle screenshots. PASS.

19 unique AEM component types confirmed across 7 sample pages: accordion, button, card, carousel, comparison-slider, container, embed, header, image, location-services, modal, navigation, navigation-list, scrollreveal, tabs, teaser, text, title, video-plyr. Top-level aemComponentMapping key is empty {} (medium issue) but per-page data is complete. PASS with low-severity note.

Header HTML is 43KB with real AEM EMU navigation component. header.links.json has 27 links (includes primary nav: Lippen, Ogen, Accentueren, Herstel, Man; FAQ dropdown; CTA 'Vind je kliniek'; logo; mobile menu duplicates). sample-scrape.json chrome.header accurately models logo, primaryNav (5 items), dropdownNav (FAQ with 5 children), ctaButton, hasMobileMenu, hasSkipToContent. PASS.

Live Playwright verification confirms footer element is genuinely empty (inner_html shows only empty AEM container, inner_text=''). footer.html (299B) matches. footer.links.json=[] is accurate. footer-desktop.png exists (96KB, non-blank — shows bottom-of-page content area). Pseudo-footer accordion with treatment/FAQ/clinic links lives in page body. Captured in sample-scrape.json chrome.footer.pseudoFooterStructure and manifest.json navigation.legalLinks. MEDIUM issue: per system prompt rule, footer.links.json must have ≥1 link. Site genuinely has none in the footer element.

6 archetypes, all sensible: homepage (2 — root redirect + /nl), treatment-page (5 — lip/eye/enhance/restore/male), faq (1 — /nl/qa), clinic-finder (3 — find-a-clinic/clinics/clinic templates), contact (1 — /nl/contact-us), legal (2 — disclaimer/algemene-voorwaarden). All nav sections in manifest.navigation.header map to at least one archetype. PASS.

summary: PASS: 14 pages captured (≥10 threshold met), sitemap cross-check confirms no truncation (13 sitemap / 14 manifest — extra is apex redirect), 3 spot-checked URLs render real Dutch content in Playwright, all 14 pages have desktop+mobile screenshots, README documents render strategy, bundle not pre-hydration (bundle text ≥ fresh-render text), 7 analysis pages all have valid cleaned HTML + screenshots, 12 content patterns and 19 AEM component types are accurate and cover main interactive elements, chrome header accurately represents nav, empty footer is genuine site design (verified live) and is documented — medium issue flagged per system-prompt rule but not a capture failure.
